heading: Recordkeeping violations
label: 6745 Recordkeeping violations
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this division”, meaning div. children.text: to establish or maintain any record required by this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter;
to submit any report, notice, or other information to the United States Government in accordance with this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter; or
to permit access to or copying of any record that is exempt from disclosure under this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter.
